title: 10 Marks of a Man Who Walks Humbly With God
caption:
"Act justly, love mercy, walk humbly with your God." — Micah 6:8.

Humility isn't weakness. It's the man who can look any other man in the eye and still get on his knees. Confident before men. Submitted before God. Not shrinking for small rooms or swelling for large ones.

This is what it looks like when the posture is real — not performed. He doesn't need the credit. He doesn't need to be the main character. He's honest about his weakness because his strength doesn't come from the performance.

Save this. Share it with a man you're watching become this.

#faith #humility #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #walkwithgod #micah68 #scripture #discipleship
